heroDescription: Kuaishou's Kling delivers cinematic AI video generation for text-to-video, image-to-video, and motion-controlled production workflows.
seoDescription: Compare Kling AI video models on Novita AI, including Kling 3.0, 2.5 Turbo, 2.1, and 1.6 variants for text-to-video, image-to-video, and motion control.
overviewBody: Kling is a video generation model family developed by Kuaishou for creating short cinematic clips from text prompts, source images, and guided visual references. The family is widely used for text-to-video and image-to-video workflows where motion quality, prompt alignment, subject consistency, and realistic physics matter.
On Novita AI, each Kling variant has a direct path to API parameters, pricing, and Playground testing so teams can validate the right model before integrating it into a production workflow.
Use this page to compare Kling versions, generation modes, and integration entry points without scanning the full model library.

capabilities.title: Cinematic video generation
capabilities.description: Generate short video clips with natural camera motion, visual coherence, and production-oriented motion quality.

capabilities.title: Text-to-video and image-to-video workflows
capabilities.description: Use Kling variants for prompt-only generation, image animation, and controlled creative iteration from visual references.

capabilities.title: Motion and reference control
capabilities.description: Choose newer Kling variants when a shot needs motion guidance, reference-video input, or editing control beyond basic generation.

capabilities.title: Versioned production choices
capabilities.description: Compare Kling 3.0, 2.5 Turbo, 2.1, 2.0, 1.6, and Kling-o1 variants by task type and integration fit.

lineupSections.title: Kling 3.0 Series
lineupSections.description: Kling 3.0 brings newer 4K video generation and motion-control workflows for higher-detail cinematic production.
items: Use Kling v3.0 4K when high-resolution text-to-video or image-to-video output is the priority.
Use Kling v3.0 Motion Control when the shot needs stronger control from motion or video references.
Open each model page to confirm supported inputs, duration, resolution, pricing, and Playground behavior.

lineupSections.title: Kling 2.6 Pro and 2.5 Turbo
lineupSections.description: Kling 2.6 Pro and 2.5 Turbo variants are suited for production iteration across prompt, image, and motion-control video workflows.
items: Use Kling 2.6 Pro when newer Pro-tier generation or motion control is required.
Use Kling 2.5 Turbo when faster text-to-video or image-to-video iteration matters.
Compare the model pages to confirm which endpoint supports the inputs required by your workflow.

lineupSections.title: Kling 2.1 and 2.0 Series
lineupSections.description: Kling 2.1, 2.1 Master, and 2.0 variants cover established high-quality text-to-video and image-to-video generation.
items: Use Kling 2.1 Master when visual fidelity and cinematic motion are the priority.
Use Kling 2.1 and 2.0 variants for established generation pipelines and compatibility with existing prompts.
Open the model page for each variant to confirm supported parameters, pricing, and playground behavior.

lineupSections.title: Kling-o1 and 1.x Series
lineupSections.description: Kling-o1 and Kling 1.x entries support reference-video, editing, image-to-video, text-to-video, and stable baseline workflows.
items: Use Kling-o1 when the workflow needs reference-video generation, video editing, or newer o1-style generation modes.
Use Kling 1.6 for stable baseline text-to-video and image-to-video generation.
Use these models to compare earlier Kling behavior against newer releases.

whyNovitaTitle: Why run Kling on Novita AI

whyNovitaItems.title: One API surface for video models
whyNovitaItems.description: Access Kling alongside other image, video, and audio generation models through the same Novita AI integration path.

whyNovitaItems.title: Dedicated integration entry points
whyNovitaItems.description: Each Kling variant links to API examples, pricing, and Playground access so developers can test the exact model they plan to use.

whyNovitaItems.title: Practical model comparison
whyNovitaItems.description: Compare generation modes, versions, and supported workflows before choosing a Kling variant for production.

faq.question: What Kling models are available on Novita AI?
faq.answer: Novita AI provides Kling 3.0, 2.6 Pro, 2.5 Turbo, 2.1, 2.0, 1.6, and Kling-o1 variants across text-to-video, image-to-video, motion-control, reference-video, and video-editing workflows.

faq.question: Which Kling model should I start with?
faq.answer: Start with the newest model that matches your input mode: 4K Kling 3.0 for high-resolution generation, Kling 2.6 Pro or 2.5 Turbo for production iteration, and Kling-o1 when reference video or editing control is required.

faq.question: Can I use Kling through an API?
faq.answer: Yes. Open an individual Kling model page to review API examples, parameters, pricing, and Playground access before integrating it.

guidanceLinks.label: Model APIs overview
guidanceLinks.description: Start with the Novita AI model API guide before integrating this model family.
